channel.title: InYourBones — Bay Area Radar (far_out)
channel.description: Curated upcoming Bay Area shows from InYourBones.

item.title: i-dle @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-08-22 03:00 — i-dle at Oakland Arena. i-dle's world tour promises a vibrant performance from one of the leading K-pop acts, appealing to a diverse audience.

item.title: Gorillaz @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-10-29 02:00 — Gorillaz at Oakland Arena. Gorillaz are known for their innovative live shows, and this tour is sure to attract a large crowd with their unique sound.

item.title: Bleachers @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-09-18 01:30 — Bleachers at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Jon Batiste's live performances are celebrated for their energy and artistry, making this a standout event.

item.title: Bonnie Raitt @ The Theater at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium
item.description: 2026-10-11 03:00 — Bonnie Raitt at The Theater at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium. The Neighbourhood's tour is highly anticipated, showcasing their indie rock sound in an engaging live setting.

item.title: Eagles of Death Metal @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-09-02 03:00 — Eagles of Death Metal at The Fillmore. Eagles of Death Metal are known for their high-energy performances, making this a compelling show for rock fans.

item.title: My Morning Jacket @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-10-04 03:00 → 2026-10-12 03:00 — My Morning Jacket at The Fillmore. My Morning Jacket's unique sound and strong live reputation make their shows a must-see for indie rock enthusiasts.

item.title: Cavetown @ Fox Theater - Oakland
item.description: 2026-10-07 03:00 — Cavetown at Fox Theater - Oakland. Five Finger Death Punch's heavy sound and dedicated fanbase ensure a powerful live experience.

item.title: Chayanne @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-10-12 02:00 — Chayanne at Chase Center. Courtney Barnett's storytelling and raw performance style make her shows a highlight for indie music fans.

item.title: Young Miko @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-10-16 03:00 — Young Miko at Chase Center. Young Miko's rising star status and engaging performances are sure to draw a vibrant crowd.

item.title: Sammy Rae & The Friends @ The Castro Theatre
item.description: 2026-10-07 03:00 → 2026-10-08 03:00 — Sammy Rae & The Friends at The Castro Theatre. Iron & Wine's intimate performances are cherished by fans, offering a unique experience in a live setting.

item.title: Jungle @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-10-08 02:00 — Jungle at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Jungle's unique blend of funk and soul, along with their captivating live shows, make this a standout event.

item.title: Sombr @ SAP Center at San Jose
item.description: 2026-10-08 02:00 — Sombr at SAP Center at San Jose.

item.title: RUSH @ SAP Center at San Jose
item.description: 2026-10-16 02:30 — RUSH at SAP Center at San Jose.
